title: thelypteris cristata var. clintoniana
intro: Thelypteris cristata var. clintoniana, also known as Clinton's fern, is a variety of the Thelypteris cristata fern species, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to North America, specifically in the southeastern United States and eastern Canada. Thelypteris cristata var. clintoniana has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems.
